findings.description: The 4-step process flow in s1 includes "対象メールのステータスを「送信中」に更新（別トランザクション）" as step 2. The intermediate "送信中" (sending) status is not stated anywhere in the source text — it appears only in the image `mail_sender_flow.png` which is not readable as text. The source text confirms "送信済み" and "送信失敗" statuses but does not mention "送信中" as an intermediate status name.
findings.source_evidence: Source references: `.. image:: images/mail/mail_sender_flow.png` (image content unreadable); important note only mentions "ステータスが送信済みのままとなる" and "ステータスを送信失敗にして" — no "送信中" status in the text portion.
